---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: umwelt

---

**Describe the bug**
  A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

  **Platform**
  Where does this bug occur?
  - [ ] Website (central.sov)
  - [ ] iOS App
  - [ ] Android App
  - [ ] Node/Backend

  **To Reproduce**
  Steps to reproduce the behavior:
  1. Go to '...'
  2. Click on '...'
  3. See error

  **Expected behavior**
  What you expected to happen.

  **Screenshots**
  If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

  **Device Info**
  - Device: [e.g. iPhone 14, Samsung Galaxy S23, MacBook Pro]
  - OS: [e.g. iOS 17, Android 14, macOS 14]
  - App Version: [e.g. 1.0.0]
  - Browser (if website): [e.g. Chrome, Safari]

  **Additional context**
  Any other information that might help us fix this issue.
